claim: Independent cross-check confirms: YOLO demand router schema readiness already blocks PRD readiness when evidence agents report missing evidence or clarify recommendations, and this behavior is covered by existing tests. The requirement is already implemented and verified.

evidence.summary: evidenceResultBlockingIssues function independently verified: missing items trigger EVIDENCE_AGENT_MISSING (lines 496-502), clarify/block recommendations trigger EVIDENCE_AGENT_CLARIFICATION_REQUIRED or EVIDENCE_AGENT_BLOCKED (lines 503-509).
evidence.why: Core implementation that converts evidence agent missing/clarify signals into PRD readiness blockers.

evidence.summary: inspectDemandPrdReadiness independently verified: calls evidenceResultBlockingIssues for each result (line 727) and aggregates blockers.
evidence.why: Integration point where evidence blocking issues are collected into the readiness check.

evidence.summary: Final decision logic independently verified: prd_ready is set to blockers.length === 0 (line 756), meaning any blocker prevents PRD readiness.
evidence.why: Final gate that ensures missing/clarify recommendations result in prd_ready false.

evidence.summary: Test independently verified: test explicitly verifies cross-checker with missing array and clarify recommendation triggers EVIDENCE_AGENT_MISSING and EVIDENCE_AGENT_CLARIFICATION_REQUIRED blockers, resulting in prd_ready false.
evidence.why: Existing test coverage proves the implementation works as required.

evidence.summary: isNonMissingStatusItem helper independently verified: filters status notes like 'no missing data identified' to prevent false positive blockers.
evidence.why: Implementation detail that prevents status notes from being treated as actual missing items.

evidence.summary: actionableMissingItems function independently verified: uses isNonMissingStatusItem to filter out status notes from missing arrays.
evidence.why: Helper function that ensures only actual missing items trigger blockers.

evidence.summary: isNonMissingStatusItem and sanitizeMissing functions independently verified: regex-based detection and filtering of status notes from missing arrays.
evidence.why: Duplicate implementation in evidence-dispatch.ts that prevents false positives from status notes.

evidence.summary: runDemandEvidenceDispatchRuntime independently verified: re-runs inspectDemandPrdReadiness after agents complete (line 575-584), updates result.readiness and result.status based on prd_ready (lines 598-603).
evidence.why: Evidence dispatch flow that updates PRD readiness after all agents finish.

risks: The existing implementation already satisfies the demand requirements. This is a verification task, not an implementation task. The demand may be already complete.

result.notes: Independent cross-check confirms all explorer claims. The demand router schema readiness already implements the required behavior: missing evidence (via the missing field) and clarify recommendations (via the recommendation field) correctly block PRD readiness. Test coverage at lines 313-353 of demand-router.test.ts explicitly verifies this behavior. No conflicts found between explorer claims and independent verification. The requirement is already satisfied in the current codebase.
